title: LOINC lab Observation (glucose, valueQuantity + UCUM) -> one measurement row
notes: A US-Core lab Observation coded with LOINC 2339-0 'Glucose [Mass/volume] in Blood' carrying valueQuantity 91.84 mg/dL (UCUM, system http://unitsofmeasure.org). Stage 1 (Observation__measurement.view.json) fans out one staging row per code.coding[]; here there is a single LOINC coding. _resolve_observation.sql walks the coding through cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab (http://loinc.org -> LOINC), finds vocab.concept (LOINC, 2339-0) = concept_id 3000483, follows 'Maps to' to a standard concept which is 3000483 itself (LOINC 2339-0 is already standard, standard_concept='S', domain_id='Measurement'), so src_concept_id == std_concept_id == 3000483. std.domain_id='Measurement' routes the row to the measurement table (NOT observation). Observation__measurement.sql projects: measurement_concept_id = std_concept_id 3000483 ('Glucose [Mass/volume] in Blood', verified Measurement domain, standard); measurement_source_value = the raw LOINC code '2339-0'; measurement_source_concept_id = src_concept_id 3000483. value_as_number = valueQuantity.value 91.84. unit_concept_id = 8840 ('milligram per deciliter', UCUM, standard) resolved from valueQuantity.code='mg/dL' against vocab.concept (vocabulary_id='UCUM', standard_concept='S'); unit_source_value = valueQuantity.unit 'mg/dL'. measurement_date / measurement_datetime come from effectiveDateTime 2016-07-13T11:58:43+01:00 (date 2016-07-13, datetime 2016-07-13 11:58:43; the view reads effective.ofType(dateTime), no timezone retained in the timestamp column). measurement_type_concept_id is the constant 32817 ('EHR', Type Concept, standard). visit_occurrence_id = referenceToId(encounter ref). No performer present -> provider_id NULL. No valueQuantity.comparator -> operator_concept_id NULL. No referenceRange -> range_low/range_high NULL. valueCodeableConcept absent -> value_as_concept_id / value_source_value NULL. status='final' passes the status filter (not entered-in-error/cancelled/unknown). value_number IS NOT NULL satisfies the value-presence WHERE, so the row is NOT dropped as a panel-parent. Exactly ONE measurement row (single coding, single distinct std concept; DISTINCT ON (id, std_concept_id) has nothing to collapse).
